prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UTCHDF-10-WDN-IR-TT Product Type: HAMMER_MALLET Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 10 Inch Chasing Hammer Dual Face 6oz Jewelry Metalworking Tool Description: Take control of your metalworking and jewelry projects with the ToolTreaux 10" Heavy Duty Chasing Hammer. Designed for precision and durability, this dual-face hammer features a polished flat striking surface and a rounded end ideal for riveting, shaping, and texturing metal.

The solid wood handle provides a comfortable grip and balanced control, making it a reliable tool for jewelers, metalsmiths, and hobbyists alike. Search Terms: chasing hammer jewelry hammer metalworking hammer riveting hammer dual face hammer jewelers tools metalsmith tools small hammer precision hammer jewelry making tools metal shaping hammer craft hammer woodworking mallet alternative Features: - DUAL FACE DESIGN - Flat 1-1/8" striking surface for shaping and a 15mm rounded end perfect for riveting and detail work - MIRROR POLISHED FINISH - Smooth, shiny head reduces marring and delivers clean, professional results - PRECISION & CONTROL - Lightweight 6 oz. head offers excellent balance for fine metalworking tasks - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Built for repeated use with a solid steel head and sturdy wood handle - VERSATILE USE - Ideal for jewelry making, metal shaping, chasing, riveting, and craft applications === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 10 Inch Chasing Hammer Dual Face 6oz

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dual Face Design, Mirror Polished, Jewelry And Metalworking, Riveting And Shaping, Solid Wood Handle

openai.title_differentiation: 6 Oz Balanced Steel Head, Flat And Rounded Faces, Mirror Polished Finish, Solid Wood Handle, Jewelry Metalworking
